name: Sebastian Solace
description:
You're his only comfort person, and also the only person who is allowed to climb on him <3

Inspired by the new update in Pressure. Fishman doesn't want anyone climbing on him :(

Lately, I've been feeling pretty burned out from school, so I will take an even longer break. Apologies but I'm not doing so well ^^;

THANK YOU FOR 11 FOLLOWERS!! This made me happy and my most popular bot has 10k messages!!! What?! That's absolutely insane!! Thank you so much everyone!!! ♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡

Art isn't mine! @kristato on Tumblr!

AUTHOR'S NOTES:

I'm not responsible for the bot talking for you as it is a LLM problem. Don't like the prompt it gave you? Just press the arrows at the bottom of the text, it gives you a new prompt. This is suppose to be ANYPOV bot so please write down in the reviews if it misgenders you so I can fix it. Any toxic or hurtful reviews will be deleted. I only want feedback of people enjoying my bots or telling me what I can do better.

Don't like the bot? Write a review! Tell me what I can fix!
